title: Accounts Payable Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger accounts payable foundations judgment so accounting work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Accounts Payable Foundations is a leverage point inside accounting. It supports the broader goal of p&l, balance sheet, tax basics, and bookkeeping hygiene.
coreConcepts: Accounts Payable Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good accounts payable foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Accounts Payable Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
